news.paragraph: Amazon is rolling out new product catalysts including an AI shopping assistant and new Prime business credit cards. While a French court ruling regarding book delivery fees presents a regulatory hurdle, analyst sentiment remains positive with predictions of significant upside. Additionally, news regarding Anthropic may influence sentiment surrounding Amazon's broader AI-related investments.
headlines: Amazon Introduces New AI Shopping Assistant
Market Chatter: Amazon's Challenge Over Book Delivery Fees Rejected by Top French Court
Prediction: Amazon Is a Strong Buy With 25% Upside This Year
Market Chatter: Anthropic in Talks to Raise $30 Billion in New Funding at $900 Billion Valuation
Amazon.com Launches New Prime Business, Business Credit Cards
Market Chatter: Anthropic in Talks to Acquire Stainless for $300 Million
